mapper.sql: id, print_template_id, form_data_id, template_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, print_type, print_count, status, error_message, tenant_id, created_at, created_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM print_record WHERE id = #{id} AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id IS NULL)
SELECT FROM print_record WHERE form_data_id = #{formDataId} AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id IS NULL) ORDER BY created_at DESC
